text.title: Meta Pixel Installation and Verification
text.summary: Pixel installation checklist, standard events to implement, and verification steps before running ads.

rule.statement: Install and verify the Meta Pixel before creating any campaign — do not run ads without confirmed event tracking.
rule.rationale: Without a firing pixel, campaign objectives requiring conversions (Sales, Leads) have no optimization signal; the algorithm delivers to random audiences at high CPMs with no learning.

list.item: PageView — automatic on all pages (base code required)
Install Meta Pixel Helper Chrome extension
Visit the website and confirm PageView fires (green indicator)
Trigger each conversion event manually (add to cart, submit form)
Check Events Manager → Test Events tab for real-time confirmation
Verify event values are passing correctly (purchase amount, currency)

rule.statement: Do not launch until conversion events show "Active" status in Events Manager for at least 24 hours with real traffic, not just test events.
rule.rationale: Test events confirm code fires but do not confirm production reliability — a deployment issue or CSP block may prevent firing in production under normal traffic.
